utir:
task_id: "proof-hello"
description: "Proof: write a file, summarize, open PR"
operations:
  - type: "shell"
    command: "mkdir -p {{WORKSPACE}}/proofs && echo $(date -u) > {{WORKSPACE}}/proofs/HELLO_ENGINE.txt"
    timeout: "5s"
    capture_output: false
  - type: "assert.shell_success"
    command: "test -s {{WORKSPACE}}/proofs/HELLO_ENGINE.txt"
    timeout: "5s"
  - type: "summarize.run"
    notes: "Created proof artefact and ensured it exists in the workspace."
  - type: "http.get"
    url: "https://example-disallowed-host.invalid/"
    timeout: "3s"
